verses.text: Kamsang Habakkuk in hih bangin thu ngen hi
Topa aw, nangma sepsa thute ka za a, lamdang ka sa mahmah hi. Na hih ngeisa na liante, kote' hunin zong hong hih kik in. Na heh hun ciang nangawnin zong hehpihna lungsim hong nei in
Teman khua panin Pasian hong pai a, Paran Mual panin Siangtho Pa hong pai hi. Ama minthan'na vang in vanpi tuam a, leitung khempeuh, amah phatna tawh kidim hi
Khuaphialep taang bangin amah hong pai a, a khutsung panin khuavak taangkhia a, tua pen a vangliatna a koihna mun ahi hi
Ama mai-ah cinatna tungsak a, tua nungah sihna zuisak pah hi
Amah a khawl ciangin leitung ling a, amah in a et ciangin minam khempeuh ling uh hi. Tangtawng lai-in a totsa, tanglai mual liante kitam kham a, a om tawntung mual neute kimetcip hi
Kush gammite a lau mahmahna, Midian gammite a lin'na ka mu hi
Topa aw, na sakolte tungah nang hong tuangin, na gualzawhna leengte tawh nong paina dingin, gunpite tungah na heh suak a, tuipi tungah thangpai na hi hiam
Na thal a lawn dingin na kithawi a, na thallawng sungah na thaltang a dimin om a, na keek in leitung kapkham hi
Mual liante in nang hong muh ciangin ling uh a, van panin guah tampi hong zu hi. Leinuai-a om tuite ging zuazua a, tuihualte in a sangpipi banto hi
Na thaltang leeng a muh ciang, na teipi te zalzal a muh ciangin, ni leh kha a omna sanah a khawlcip uh hi
A hehsa-in leitungah na pai a, a sinso sa-in minamte na tuancil hi
Na mite a honkhia dingin na paikhia a, na teel kumpipa, a honkhia dingin na kuankhia hi. Migilote' makaipa na sugawp a, a nungzui khempeuh tawh zong na sumai hi
Mi cimawhte, mun simthamah a sukgawp bangin, kote a hong suthang dingin huihpi bangin hong pai laitakin na thal tawh a galkapmangpa na kaplet hi
Nangmah in na sakolte tawh tuipi na tuancil a, tui lianpite phuan zuazua hi

Hih thute khempeuh ka zak ciangin ka pumlin' a, lau lua-in ka muk ling sapsap hi. Ka guh ka taang hong zen a, guh neilo bangin ka pukcipsuk hi. Ko hong simgawp mite Pasian in gim a piak ding hun daitakin ka ngak khikhe ding hi
Theigahte a hut khin a, leengguite a gah kei zongin, oliv kungte gahlo a, lo-ah an a piang kei zongin, tuu khempeuh a si khin a, ganbuk khempeuh a hawm khin zongin
Topa Pasian pen hong honkhiapa ahih manin lungdamin ka kipak lai veve ding hi
Topa Pasian, keima thahatna ahi hi; sakhi khe bangin ka khe hong zaptelsak a, mun sangna-ah lungmuang takin kei hong paisak hi.
